31.reason: [The qsort call starts sorting from info + 1, which skips the first element (index 0). It should be qsort(info, n, sizeof(line), cmp) to sort the entire array.]

reasons.buggy-qwen3-max-single: 1.0 , reason:  [The qsort call starts sorting from info + 1, which skips the first element (index 0). It should be qsort(info, n, sizeof(line), cmp) to sort the entire array.]
